caption: Just got caught in the most perfect spring light here in Santorini, feeling so free and effortlessly happy ✨. My skin is glowing under the warm sun and this lightweight linen dress is honestly my new favorite travel companion 🌸. Can’t wait to explore more, sip a cold drink, and soak in every moment of this radiant season 🥂🌺. #SpringVibes #SantoriniTravel #WanderlustLife
